has_item_locket: That pendant — let me see it closer.
My father had one with this exact engraving. He went into the mountains and never came back.
after_monster_seen: Run, Aldric. I felt it the moment it stepped into the valley. Just run.
loop_gte_2: You look pale today. Like you've slept badly.
default: Take a roll if you want — oven's still warm.

after_monster_seen: Something's wrong with this place. I'll scout up the pass — won't be long.
loop_gte_2: You've got that look. Like you know something I don't.
default: Aldric! Coming up the slope today?

after_monster_seen: Where's Cass? Did you see him up there?
talked_to_cass: So you spoke to him. Tell me he wasn't planning anything stupid.
default: Mornin'. My brother's up the mountain again. Always pushing.

after_monster_seen: I dreamt of it. The thing from the mountain. Many times.
loop_gte_2: You've got that look. Like you've seen this morning before.
default: The river's quiet today. Wasn't always so.
Lost a son to it, long before you were born.

after_monster_seen: So it found you. Keep the charm close, Aldric.
loop_gte_2: You found your way back. Good.
default: You've come far, Aldric. Take what's on the altar.
